titleStmt.title: SII 18.259: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 259. (B.K. No. 21 of 1933-34.) KĀGINELLI, HIREKERUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Hero-stone set up near the Vīrabhadradēva temple.

summary.p: This inscription belonging to the reign of Rāmachandradēva is dated in Śaka 1204, Chitrabhānu, Mārgaśira ba. 7, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1282, November 23, Sunday, f.d.t. ·42.
It commemorates the death of Buguḍara Siddayya of Kāgenele, who died in a fight when Sōyidēva of Bandaṇike, attacked Taravūr. The valour of the martyr is extolled in verse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷapravuḍhapratā
pacakravartti śrīvīrarāmacaṁdradēva vijayarājyōdayada sakavarṣada 1204 citra
bhānusaṁvatsarada mārggasira bahuḷa 7 yādityavāradaṁdu svasti śrīmanu
mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ nigaḷaṁkamalla baṁdaṇikeya sōyidēvanu paridhāḷi
yiṭṭu taravūra muttidalli kāgeneleya buguḍara siddayyanu vairi
balamaṁ taḷtiṟidu koṁdu raṇajitanenni suralōkaprāptanāda vīra
veṁteṁdaḍe

toḍarddarisaiṁyasaṁkuḷakarigaḷa tadbhujadī kuṭhāradiṁ kaḍidu mahājiraṁgajitasu
grabaḷāṁnvitavīratējamaṁ paḍedu jagatrayaṁ pogaḷalaṇmida gaṁḍaradēvaneṁda
ḍī kā(ka)ḍugali vōrvvanurvvigenutippudu lōkaprasiddha sidhdhananu . vri . hu
radāṇi sōmabhūmipaṁ besasalu dhāḷiyi
rakoṭṭa mava māḍi maṁḍaḷika bīrana
rttadoḷu biddanu buguḍara si
norvvana nūrvvareṁdu pūma
ḷegaṟeyalu divijaṁganeyaru voydaru sivanali mukutiyanu siddhivaḍe
daṁ siddhanu .
Digital edition of SII 18.259 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
